value.found_quote: You can disable this escape hatch by setting `"allowUnsandboxedCommands": false` in your [sandbox settings](/en/settings#sandbox-settings). When disabled, which the `/sandbox` Overrides tab shows as **Strict sandbox mode**, the `dangerouslyDisableSandbox` parameter is completely ignored and all commands must run sandboxed or be explicitly listed in `excludedCommands`.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Strict sandbox mode (the state when allowUnsandboxedCommands is false) as disabling the unsandboxed escape hatch, ignoring dangerouslyDisableSandbox and requiring all commands to run sandboxed.
